title: Apply security regulatory requirements to work in the medicinal cannabis industry
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Apply security regulatory requirements to work in the medicinal cannabis industry demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Comply with employment obligations

pcs.text: Identify workplace policies and procedures and regulatory requirements in relation to own work responsibilities in medicinal cannabis production processes
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify workplace policies and procedures and regulatory requirements in relation to own work responsibilities in medicinal cannabis production processes?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify workplace policies and procedures and regulatory requirements in relation to own work responsibilities in medicinal cannabis production processes.

pcs.text: Identify employee obligations and risks around diversion to illicit use
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify employee obligations and risks around diversion to illicit use?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify employee obligations and risks around diversion to illicit use.

pcs.text: Maintain suitability for employment according to workplace and regulatory requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Maintain suitability for employment according to workplace and regulatory requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Maintain suitability for employment according to workplace and regulatory requirements.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Comply with employment obligations

elements.title: Comply with security and safety procedures

pcs.text: Apply security procedures across all access controls in relation to work responsibilities according to workplace procedures and regulatory requirements

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Apply security procedures across all access controls in relation to work responsibilities according to workplace procedures and regulatory requirements.

pcs.text: Complete and maintain the sign in/sign out register according to workplace procedures and regulatory requirements

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Complete and maintain the sign in/sign out register according to workplace procedures and regulatory requirements.

pcs.text: Maintain confidentiality of cannabis site and operations according to workplace policy and regulatory requirements

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Maintain confidentiality of cannabis site and operations according to workplace policy and regulatory requirements.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Comply with security and safety procedures

elements.title: Respond to security incidents or emergencies

pcs.text: Report breaches of unauthorised access and intruder suspects according to workplace reporting procedures

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Report breaches of unauthorised access and intruder suspects according to workplace reporting procedures.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Respond to incidents or emergencies according to training and drills used in preparation for intrusion or emergencies.

pcs.text: Contact appropriate police, security and/or emergency services according to supervisor instructions and workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Contact appropriate police, security and/or emergency services according to supervisor instructions and workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Contact appropriate police, security and/or emergency services according to supervisor instructions and workplace procedures.

pcs.text: Support police, security and/or emergency services as requested

pcs.text: Complete incident reporting requirements according to workplace procedures

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Complete incident reporting requirements according to workplace procedures.

elements.title: Comply with cannabis disposal and destruction regulatory requirements

pcs.text: Weigh and store, dispose of or destroy any parts of cannabis that is not to be manufactured into a medicinal product according to workplace procedures and regulatory requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Weigh and store, dispose of or destroy any parts of cannabis that is not to be manufactured into a medicinal product according to workplace procedures and regulatory requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Weigh and store, dispose of or destroy any parts of cannabis that is not to be manufactured into a medicinal product according to workplace procedures and regulatory requirements.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Clean and sanitise equipment that has been in contact with cannabis to ensure residual cannabis is removed to prevent the risk of diversion.

pcs.text: Record and report completion of disposal and destruction activities, including any discrepancies in recorded cannabis weights, according to workplace procedures and regulatory requirements

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Record and report completion of disposal and destruction activities, including any discrepancies in recorded cannabis weights, according to workplace procedures and regulatory requirements.
